speaker: speaker2
text: Of course , they are out there .

speaker: speaker2
text: Are you stupid ? They are called UFOs , so not everybody can see them .

speaker: speaker1
text: You mean that you can them .

speaker: speaker2
text: That's right . I can see them in my dreams .

speaker: speaker2
text: No . Their task is to send the aliens here from the outer space .

speaker: speaker1
text: Aliens from the outer space ? Do you talk to them ? What do they look like ?

speaker: speaker2
text: OK , OK , one by one , please ! They look like robots , but they can speak . Their mission is to make friends with human beings .

speaker: speaker1
text: That means that you talk to them ? In which language ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Of course in English , they learn English on Mars too .
